description.value:
This cloak is made of turquoise scales that absorb moisture, hydrating the wearer. After being fully submerged in water for 1 hour, the cloak allows aquatic creatures, such as azarketis, to stay out of water for up to 1 week without penalties, after which it must be submerged again.

Activate—Pull Hood 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You pull the cloak's hood up and gain the effects of a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Water Walk] until you pull the hood down, to a maximum of 10 minutes.
